{{Quote|Well, if you're interested in continuing on in Ord Mantell, you should seek out Laetin. Mind you, he has much more challenging assignments.|[[Serissu]], to a Car'das pilot|<ref name="SWG:E">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|Escorting|Tansarii Point Station}}</ref>}}
'''Laetin A'shera''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] for the [[Car'das/Legends|Car'das]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|I only oversee the Lucent Ivaya and her activities.|Laetin A'shera, to a Car'das pilot|<ref name="SWG:AtA">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|Assassinating the Assassin|Tansarii Point Station}}</ref>}}
Laetin A'shera was a well-trained pilot for the [[Car'das/Legends|Car'das]] based on [[Tansarii Point Station/Legends|Tansarii Point Station]], along with [[Serissu]], [[Aleas Rans'ery]] and [[Dartas Pytin]].<ref name="SWG:SfBS" /> In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline">{{SWG_timeline}}</ref> Laetin A'shera oversaw all Car'das operations in the [[Lucent Ivaya]] quadrant of the [[Bright Jewel system/Legends|Bright Jewel system]].<ref name="SWG:AtA" />

[[File:LaetinAshera-SWZ.png|thumb|left|250px|Laetin A'shera in his [[M3-A Scyk interceptor/Legends|M3-A Scyk fighter]].]]
During the [[Battle of Tansarii Point Station/Legends|Battle of Tansarii Point Station]] between Car'das and [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] forces, Laetin A'shera dispatched pilots to search for and eliminate Black Sun spies among [[Dynath Miners|Dynathian]] [[Unidentified transport class|mining transports]]. Information found on a Black Sun spy was quickly transmitted to Agent [[Rayar]] of the Car'das intelligence ring.<ref name="SWG:SfBS" /> A'shera then sent his pilots escort Dynath Miners from the [[Masul'ivis Asteroid Belt]] back to their [[H-5 70 Mining Facility|mining facility]].<ref name="SWG:EtDMBTtS">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|Escorting the Dynath Miner Back To the Station|Tansarii Point Station}}</ref> Later, during a mission to warn the Car'das allies about Black Sun activity, the Car'das [[M3-A Scyk interceptor/Legends|M3-A Scyk fighters]] were infected by the [[Black Envy]], a Black Sun [[Computer virus/Legends|computer virus]].<ref name="SWG:WtA">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|Warning the Allies|Tansarii Point Station}}</ref> Laetin A'shera and his pilots decided to use it to their advantage and finally trapped the Black Sun assassin [[Talonbane Cobra/Legends|Talonbane Cobra]] in the [[Lurid Aurora Nebula]].<ref name="SWG:AtA" />

==Behind the scenes==
Laetin A'shera was a [[Wikipedia:Non-player character|non-player character]] in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:SfBS" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> Laetin A'shera was added to the game as part of the "[[W:c:swg:New Player Tutorial|New Player Tutorial]],"<ref name="SWG:SfBS" /> introduced with the release of the "[[W:c:swg:Publish 25 Notes for November 15, 2005|Publish 25]]," a.k.a. the "[[W:c:swg:New Game Enhancements|New Game Enhancements]]," on [[November 15]], [[2005]].<ref name="SonyCite-Publish Archive 2005">{{SonyCite|url=players/content.vm?id=64886&resource=publish|text=Publish Archive 2005}}</ref>
